allow:
Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial deployment of Ms. Luminara''s Quiz Lab

Features:
- Gamified A&P quiz with 189+ questions across 7 topics
- D20 RPG system with stats, rolls, and equipment
- XP/leveling with streak multipliers and Lucky Strike bonus
- Multiple study modes: Standard, Jeopardy, Blitz, Lightning, Spaced Review
- PWA support for iPhone "Add to Home Screen"
- Offline functionality via service worker
- Isotope-tagged semantic memory system
- Zone of Proximal Development scaffolding
- Spaced repetition for optimal retention

Topics covered:
- Brain structure and function
- Nervous system and reflexes
- Anatomical foundations
- Tissue types
- Autonomic nervous system
- Special senses
- Endocrine system

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Reduce repetitive phrases in quiz explanations

Cleaned up overused phrases across all question banks while
maintaining Ms. Luminara''s distinctive teaching voice:

- Removed excessive "Come closer/with me" openings
- Removed formulaic "Isn't that beautiful/exquisite?"" endings
- Removed repetitive ""Here's where it gets delicious/beautiful"
- Removed "Let yourself sink into this mechanism" filler
- Removed "Stay with me" and "Wait for it" interruptions
- Removed "The body does this thousands of times per second"

The explanations retain their pedagogical structure, physics-first
metaphors, and warmth - just without the repetitive scaffolding
that made them predictable. Ms. Luminara''s voice is preserved
through varied phrasing.

Files modified: 31 question bank JSON files across all 7 topics

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Remove voice system from quiz project

Voice files moved to G:\Studying_Help\voice-work\ for potential future use.

Changes:
- Removed 000.9-voice-system.js (2349 lines)
- Removed 000.2.1-renderer-voice-lab.js (977 lines) 
- Cleaned up 000.2-renderer.js (removed ~3700 lines of voice code)
- Removed voice CSS from styles.css (~2900 lines)
- Removed voice buttons from character mini display
- Removed voiceSystem references from app.js, renderer files

The quiz retains full functionality without voice features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add roguelike Gauntlet mode with boss battles and arcade mechanics

The Luminara Gauntlet - a new roguelike adventure mode featuring:

Boss System (000.15-boss-system.js):
- 6 themed bosses: The Forgetful One, The Procrastinator, The Anxiety
  Spiral, The Distraction Demon, The Imposter, Ms. Luminara''s Shadow
- Each boss has unique HP, armor, abilities, phases, and weaknesses
- BossEncounter class for battle state management
- Secret boss unlocked after defeating all regular bosses

Run Manager (000.16-run-manager.js):
- Wave-based progression with boss every 2 waves
- 4 difficulty modes: Study Session, Standard, Challenge, Nightmare
- Score calculation with streak, boss, time, and HP bonuses
- Arcade tokens earned from runs for power-up purchases
- Run history and statistics tracking

Power-ups (000.17-powerups.js):
- 15+ silly power-ups like Caffeine Rush, Rubber Duck Debugging,
  Call Mom, Wikipedia Rabbit Hole, Grade Curve
- Unlock system based on gameplay milestones
- Active effects: damage multipliers, shields, hints, healing
- Arcade token shop integration

High Scores (000.18-high-scores.js):
- Top 10 leaderboard with rank titles
- 12 rank titles from "Study Sprout" to "Legendary Scholar"
- 20+ achievements for various accomplishments
- Fun anatomy facts shown after each run
- Personal bests and career stats tracking

D20 Combat Extensions (000.7-d20-system.js):
- attackBoss(): INT-based attack roll vs boss armor
- defendAgainstBoss(): CON-based damage reduction
- specialAbilityCheck(): WIS-based special abilities

Boss Loot Tables (000.8-loot-system.js):
- Each boss has unique guaranteed drops and special items
- Consumables with temporary stat boosts
- Increased gem and gold drops from bosses

UI Additions:
- New Gauntlet tab in mode navigation
- Boss arena with HP bars, taunts, abilities, and actions
- Attack/Special/Defend battle actions
- Victory and defeat screens with score breakdown
- High scores leaderboard overlay
- Power-up shop with unlock progress
- Run progress bar during active runs

CSS Styling:
- Boss arena with animated glow effects
- Difficulty selection grid
- Battle action buttons with hover states
- Score breakdown and loot displays
- Power-up activation animations
- Responsive mobile layout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix syntax errors in loot-system and renderer classes

Fixed class structure issues causing JavaScript parse errors:

000.8-loot-system.js:
- Removed premature class-closing brace before boss loot methods
- Converted `static BOSS_LOOT_TABLES` to `getBossLootTable(bossId)` 
  method for browser compatibility (ES6 static class fields not
  universally supported)

000.2-renderer.js:
- Removed premature class-closing brace before boss UI methods
  (renderBossEncounter, showBossDamage, etc.)

Both files now parse correctly and LootSystem initializes properly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Bump service worker cache to v3, add Gauntlet assets

Gauntlet mode JavaScript files in the cache list:
- 000.15-boss-system.js
- 000.16-run-manager.js
- 000.17-powerups.js
- 000.18-high-scores.js

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Switch to network-first caching strategy

Truly roguelike - every refresh fetches fresh files from the server.
Cache is now only used as offline fallback.

Changes:
- Network-first fetch strategy (was cache-first)
- Cache updated with fresh content after each fetch
- Offline mode still works via cached fallback
- Bumped to v4 to force immediate takeover

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add mobile-optimized version for iOS/touch devices

New files:
- mobile.html - Streamlined mobile layout with bottom tab navigation
- 000-core/000.0-mobile.css - Touch-first CSS with iOS safe area support

Mobile optimizations:
- Bottom navigation bar (iOS tab bar style)
- Larger touch targets (54px minimum)
- Simplified mode tabs (icons only)
- iOS safe area padding for notch/home indicator
- Reduced visual complexity for smaller screens
- Portrait-optimized layouts
- Prevents pull-to-refresh interference
- Grid layouts for categories and options

Includes Study, Review, Blitz, Gauntlet, and Stats modes.
Access via: luminara.natalie-eiryk.com/mobile.html

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add prominent RPG character bar to mobile version

The mobile experience is now loot-driven and game-first:

Character Bar (sticky top HUD):
- Avatar with tap-to-view character sheet
- Character title and level display
- HP bar with color-coded health status (green/yellow/red)
- XP bar showing progress to next level
- Streak counter with fire animation when active
- Inventory button for quick loot access

Quick Stats Row:
- INT/WIS/CON modifiers (tap for full character sheet)
- Gold display (tap for inventory)
- Insight points (tap to use during questions)

All RPG elements are now prominently displayed and interactive,
making the loot hunt and character progression the star of the show.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix iPhone safe area - larger RPG elements with more padding

Character bar and quick stats now properly account for:
- Dynamic Island / notch with extra top padding
- Rounded screen corners with side safe areas
- Larger touch targets throughout (48px avatar, 48px inventory btn)

Visual improvements:
- Thicker HP/XP bars (14px) with glow effects
- Larger streak counter with glow when active
- Quick stats row with bigger tap targets (40px min-height)
- Gold border accent on character bar
- Avatar with glow shadow

All RPG elements should now be clearly visible and tappable
on all iPhone models.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix mobile script loading order - add missing scaffold-remediation

Scripts must load in dependency order:
1. persistence.js (base storage)
2. gamification.js (depends on persistence) 
3. scaffolding.js
4. d20-system.js
5. loot-system.js
6. scaffold-remediation.js (was missing!)
7. boss/run/powerups/highscores
8. renderer.js (depends on all systems)
9. app.js (initializes everything - must be last)

Also bumped SW cache to v6 and added scaffold-remediation to cache list.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C "G:/Studying_Help/ms_luminara_quiz" commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''

)")
